design_philosophy.rationale: For an HR/Interview proctoring tool, Authority, Clarity, and Truth are paramount. A Swiss & High-Contrast design provides a sterile, highly legible, and objective environment that builds trust. It reduces candidate anxiety by presenting information cleanly, while giving recruiters a functional, dense command center.

primary.name: Signal Blue
primary.usage: Primary actions, active states, progress bars.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (Tailwind Scale p-6, p-8, p-12)

dashboard_grid.rules: Every pixel utilized. Use h-full on children. No jagged bottoms.

buttons.primary: rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-semibold transition-all border border-transparent bg-gray-950 text-white hover:bg-gray-800 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-600 focus:ring-offset-2
buttons.secondary: rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-semibold transition-all border border-gray-300 bg-white text-gray-950 hover:border-gray-950 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-600 focus:ring-offset-2
buttons.danger: rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-semibold transition-all border border-transparent bg-red-500 text-white hover:bg-red-600

components.cards: rounded-none border border-gray-200 bg-white shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
components.inputs: rounded-none border border-gray-300 bg-white px-4 py-2 focus:border-gray-950 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-gray-950 focus:outline-none transition-colors
components.badges: rounded-none px-2 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider border border-gray-200 bg-gray-50

surfaces.header: bg-white border-b border-gray-200 z-50 sticky top-0
surfaces.video_container: bg-black border border-gray-950 relative overflow-hidden group
surfaces.proctor_alert_banner: bg-red-500 text-white p-3 font-semibold text-sm flex items-center gap-2
surfaces.ai_chat: bg-white border border-gray-200 p-6 flex flex-col h-full

motion.hover_effects: Subtle border darkening and slight shadow lift. No bouncing.

images.description: Candidate video placeholder in interview room

accessibility.contrast: WCAG AA minimum. Use high contrast black/white for primary data.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-600 focus:ring-offset-2).
accessibility.test_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='create-session-btn', data-testid='mic-test-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: TECH STACK: React, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI.
COMPONENT OVERRIDES: When using Shadcn, override rounded borders to `rounded-none` to match the Swiss Brutalist aesthetic. Use strict 1px or 2px solid borders instead of soft drop shadows.

INTERVIEW ROOM LAYOUT: Split the screen horizontally on mobile and vertically on desktop. The AI Question/Editor should dominate (60-70% width), with the Candidate Webcam and Timer pinned to the side (30-40% width).
PROCTORING ALERTS: Display proctoring violations (e.g., 'Multiple faces detected', 'Tab switched') as high-contrast red or yellow banners immediately overlaid on or above the webcam feed.
DATA VISUALIZATION: Use Recharts for the Results Dashboard. Keep charts minimal, using solid colors (Blue-600, Gray-950, Red-500) and no gradients.
BRANDING: Use a strong typographic logo with a Lucide Icon (e.g., `<Target /> AI Proctor`) rather than a generic image.
TESTING: Add `data-testid` to all forms, inputs, buttons, and alert components for End-to-End testing reliability.
ICONS: Install `lucide-react` and use it exclusively for system icons to maintain a crisp, consistent weight.
